coverage.note: Coverage tool failed to generate output (known TUnit/dotnet-coverage issue). Manual analysis confirms all 5 production files have dedicated test files.

findings.issue: ContainsElement mixed-numeric path had no test. Contains operator only tested with strings, never with collections. In operator only tested with same-type elements.
findings.impact: The ContainsElement fix (normalizing types per element to handle boxed int vs long) was review-driven code with no test proving it worked. Could regress silently.
findings.suggestion: Added 6 tests: collection contains (hit/miss), mixed-numeric contains (int-in-long-list, long-in-int-list), mixed-numeric in (both directions). All pass. FIXED.

findings.issue: __condition__ MemoryStack signal (line 26 of if.cs) was not directly tested by any If handler test. Only tested indirectly through StepsSubStepTests.
findings.impact: If the signal mechanism broke (e.g., wrong key name, wrong value type), only integration-level step tests would catch it, not the unit tests. The deletion test: if line 26 were deleted, no IfHandlerTest would fail.
findings.suggestion: Added 2 tests verifying __condition__ is set to true/false in MemoryStack after Run(). FIXED.

findings.issue: Run_GoalExecutionFails_PropagatesError (line 182) only asserts result.Success == false. Does not check Error.Key or Error.StatusCode.
findings.impact: Code could return the wrong error type (e.g., 'SerializationError' instead of 'NotFound') and the test would still pass.
findings.suggestion: Add assertion on result.Error.Key == 'NotFound' or equivalent. Not fixed in this session (minor).

findings.issue: IfTrue_GoalNotFound_ReturnsError (line 164) only asserts result.Success == false. Same weak assertion pattern.
findings.suggestion: Strengthen with Error.Key assertion. Not fixed (minor, same pattern as finding 3).

findings.issue: No PLang .goal pipeline tests exist for the new condition actions (if with Left/Operator/Right, compare, sub-steps). Builder prompt not yet updated.
findings.impact: Full pipeline (builder -> .pr -> GoalMapper -> runtime) is untested for the new action format. Expected: builder prompt update is a separate task.
findings.suggestion: PLang pipeline tests should be added when the builder prompt is updated to generate Left/Operator/Right. Not actionable until then.

summary: All 1588 C# tests pass (1580 existing + 8 new). Two major gaps fixed: (1) ContainsElement mixed-numeric path now has 6 tests proving the review-driven NormalizeTypes fix works, (2) __condition__ MemoryStack signal now directly tested in IfHandlerTests. Two minor weak-assertion findings noted but not blocking. PLang pipeline tests deferred pending builder prompt update. Zero regressions.
